overall.description: Cinematic game engine footage of a spaceship navigating through a dense asteroid canyon and field, passing a massive orbital ring structure, and making a close approach to the cratered gray surface of Planet Terminus in the Pyro system. The sequence shows continuous forward flight from enclosed rocky canyons into open space with prominent celestial objects.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow asteroid canyon with rocky walls

events.description: spaceship emerges from dark canyon into slightly brighter open space with visible starfield
massive orbital ring structure becomes visible in the distance ahead
large gray planet becomes visible on the right side of the frame

agents.ego_description: piloting spaceship through narrow asteroid canyon and emerging into open field, navigating around floating rocks

entered.detail: dark gray rocky canyon walls surrounding the flight path on both sides
floating rocks and debris scattered throughout the asteroid field
massive circular space structure spanning the horizon with metallic framework
large gray planet with cratered surface visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a dark, narrow asteroid canyon with rocky walls closing in on both sides. As the spaceship emerges into open space around 5 seconds, the lighting increases slightly to reveal a starfield. The massive orbital ring structure appears in the distance around 8 seconds, followed by the first glimpse of Planet Terminus on the right at 13 seconds. The ship navigates through scattered asteroids while maintaining steady forward momentum.

scene_state.functional_zone: open space with massive orbital ring and approaching planet

events.description: clearing the dense asteroid field into open space with unobstructed views
orbital ring structure passes to the left and begins exiting the field of view

agents.ego_description: navigating through remaining asteroids while approaching the ring structure and planet, maintaining steady thrust

segments.scene_description: The spaceship flies through open space with the massive orbital ring structure dominating the center view before passing it on the left. Planet Terminus grows significantly larger, moving from the right edge toward the center of the frame. The remaining scattered asteroids drift past as the ship clears the dense field, with the ring structure eventually disappearing behind the left side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: planetary approach with detailed cratered surface

events.description: text overlay appears identifying the location as Planet Terminus, Pyro VI
ship adjusts to low altitude flight over the planet's cratered terrain

agents.ego_description: making close approach to planet surface, flying low over detailed cratered terrain and rocky formations

entered.detail: detailed rocky terrain with impact craters and ridges filling the view

segments.scene_description: The spaceship makes its final approach to Planet Terminus, with the planet's gray, cratered surface now filling most of the frame. The camera flies low over the detailed terrain, revealing surface ridges and rocky outcrops. At 42 seconds, a text overlay identifies the location as 'Planet Terminus, Pyro VI'. The orbital ring and asteroids are no longer visible as the ship focuses on the planetary surface navigation.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward flight from the claustrophobic depths of a rocky canyon into the vast expanse of space and finally toward a planetary surface. It begins within a dark, narrow asteroid canyon with towering walls, moving steadily forward until the environment opens into a star-filled void. As the ship clears the dense field, a massive orbital ring structure dominates the center view before sliding to the left, while the gray sphere of Planet Terminus emerges from the periphery to fill the frame. The scene then shifts from the emptiness of space to a close-approach descent, with the orbital ring disappearing as the camera flies low over the planet's detailed, cratered terrain. Finally, the perspective glides over rocky outcrops and surface ridges as a text overlay identifies the location as Planet Terminus, Pyro VI.
